qa_pairs.question: What is Siku?
qa_pairs.answer: Siku is a general-purpose high-performance computing cluster.

qa_pairs.question: What type of computing cluster is Siku?
qa_pairs.answer: Siku is a general-purpose high-performance computing cluster.

qa_pairs.question: Who operates the Siku cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: The Siku cluster is operated by ACENET.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find the official documentation for Siku?
qa_pairs.answer: The official documentation for Siku is available at [https://wiki.ace-net.ca/wiki/Siku](https://wiki.ace-net.ca/wiki/Siku).
